name: Suno Character Count
description: Checks Style Prompt ≤1000 chars and Lyrics field ≤5000 chars on song file save, flags overflows with specific counts

then.prompt: Check this song file's character counts against Suno limits. Measure: 1) Style Prompt section (from 'STYLE PROMPT:' through [Exclusions:]) — limit 1000 chars, 2) Lyrics section (from [Title:] through last lyric/tag before Production Notes, including all section tags and direction blocks) — limit 5000 chars. Report: 🚨 if OVER limit with exact count and suggestion, ⚠️ if within 10% of limit, ✅ if safely within limits.
